title: Allahabad High Court grants bail to man booked for production of offensive songs about Hindu deities
description: The Allahabad High Court recently granted bail to a man accused of allegedly providing support in producing offensive YouTube songs targeting Hindu deities. [Rajveer Singh Yadav v. State of UP]Justice Sameer Jain observed that accused Rajveer Singh Yadav was not named in the first information report (FIR) and was implicated only during investigation based on the statement of co-accused Saroj Sargam. “As per allegation applicant and co-accused... hurt the religious sentiments of Hindu Community b
